story: According to the journal DesignIntelligence, which annually publishes "America's Best Architecture and Design Schools," the School of Architecture and Urban Design at the University of Kansas was named the best in the Midwest and ranked 11th among all undergraduate architecture programs in the U.S in 2012.
q1: In 2012, DesignIntelligence ranked the University of Kansas School of Architecture as the top undergraduate architecture program in the United States. (True/False?)
